'''saluju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deadishness|deadishness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-l-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deadishness|deadishness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| saluju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sælijith|sælijith]] || [[word:sælijij|sælijij]] || [[word:sælijish|sælijish]] || [[word:sæliji|sæliji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:salulujuth|salulujuth]] || [[word:salulujuj|salulujuj]] || [[word:salulujush|salulujush]] || [[word:saluluju|saluluju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:salujuth|salujuth]] || [[word:salujuj|salujuj]] || [[word:salujush|salujush]] || [[word:saluju|saluju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:salufjuth|salufjuth]] || [[word:salufjuj|salufjuj]] || [[word:salufjush|salufjush]] || [[word:salufjuf|salufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:salujuthu|salujuthu]] || [[word:salujuju|salujuju]] || [[word:salujushu|salujushu]] || [[word:salujuku|salujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:salujuth|salujuth]] || [[word:salujuj|salujuj]] || [[word:salujush|salujush]] || [[word:saluju|saluju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:salujuthul|salujuthul]] || [[word:salujujul|salujujul]] || [[word:salujushul|salujushul]] || [[word:salujukul|salujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:salujuthuthu|salujuthuthu]] || [[word:salujujuju|salujujuju]] || [[word:salujushushu|salujushushu]] || [[word:salujuku|salujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:salujuthun|salujuthun]] || [[word:salujujun|salujujun]] || [[word:salujushun|salujushun]] || [[word:salujukun|salujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:salujuthuoro|salujuthuoro]] || [[word:salujujuoro|salujujuoro]] || [[word:salujushuoro|salujushuoro]] || [[word:salujukuoro|salujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
